arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits huge failure as Liverpool boss “not able” to help star to shine
arts.sum: It’s not been a vintage season for Darwin Nunez at Liverpool, and boss, Arne Slot, has acknowledged collective failings in not being able to get the striker playing his best in 2024/25. According to transfermarkt, the Uruguayan has just four goals and four assists from his 26 appearances in all competitions so far in the […] The post Arne Slot admits huge failure as Liverpool boss “not able” to help star to shine appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to receive new Trent Alexander-Arnold offer from Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are still determined to secure the signing of Trent Alexander-Arnold in January, rather than wait to get him for free in the summer. They had an opening offer turned down by Liverpool earlier in the month, but that has not deterred club bosses in their pursuit of the English right-back. arts.sum: Liverpool head to Brentford in the Premier League today looking to bounce back from successive league draws. Arne Slot’s side saw their lead at the top of the division to four points in midweek, after being held at Nottingham Forest. Diogo Jota came off the bench to score with his first touch and cancel out […] The post Liverpool XI vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Liverpool preview: Jota a doubt | No fresh Bees injury concerns
arts.sum: Jota has a chequered injury record, having missed 66 matches over the last two and a half seasons, but Slot said the striker was not receiving any special treatment in relation to that. Liverpool are likely to be without Diogo Jota, who came off the bench in midweek to snatch at point at Nottingham Forest, for the trip to Brentford after he reported some discomfort after the game and trained separately from the main squad on Thursday.
